'''tadhala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadbook|roadbook]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-dh-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadbook|roadbook]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tadhala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tædhælæth|tædhælæth]] || [[word:tædhælæj|tædhælæj]] || [[word:tædhælæsh|tædhælæsh]] || [[word:tædhælæ|tædhælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tadhadhalath|tadhadhalath]] || [[word:tadhadhalaj|tadhadhalaj]] || [[word:tadhadhalash|tadhadhalash]] || [[word:tadhadhala|tadhadhala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tadhalath|tadhalath]] || [[word:tadhalaj|tadhalaj]] || [[word:tadhalash|tadhalash]] || [[word:tadhala|tadhala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tadhaflath|tadhaflath]] || [[word:tadhaflaj|tadhaflaj]] || [[word:tadhaflash|tadhaflash]] || [[word:tadhaflaf|tadhaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tadhalatha|tadhalatha]] || [[word:tadhalaja|tadhalaja]] || [[word:tadhalasha|tadhalasha]] || [[word:tadhalaka|tadhalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tadhalath|tadhalath]] || [[word:tadhalaj|tadhalaj]] || [[word:tadhalash|tadhalash]] || [[word:tadhala|tadhala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tadhalathal|tadhalathal]] || [[word:tadhalajal|tadhalajal]] || [[word:tadhalashal|tadhalashal]] || [[word:tadhalakal|tadhalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tadhalathatha|tadhalathatha]] || [[word:tadhalajaja|tadhalajaja]] || [[word:tadhalashasha|tadhalashasha]] || [[word:tadhalaka|tadhalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tadhalathan|tadhalathan]] || [[word:tadhalajan|tadhalajan]] || [[word:tadhalashan|tadhalashan]] || [[word:tadhalakan|tadhalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tadhalathaoro|tadhalathaoro]] || [[word:tadhalajaoro|tadhalajaoro]] || [[word:tadhalashaoro|tadhalashaoro]] || [[word:tadhalakaoro|tadhalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
